title: Code Duello: From the Tithebanner Saga
original_title: Code Duello: From the Tithebanner Saga
overview: A cosmic tragedy following a cataclysmic collision of galaxies. Two survivors navigate the strange new world in which they find themselves, searching for a place in society in order to survive and build a new life together.
